title: cyclophyllum coprosmoides var. spathulatum
intro: Cyclophyllum coprosmoides var. spathulatum, also known as a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, is a type of shrub native to tropical forests in the Pacific Islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Cyclophyllum coprosmoides var. spathulatum include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be applied to the skin to harness its medicinal properties.
